languages.text: Укрепленный арматурой из пластали ферробетон способен стать прочным основанием самого колоссального шпиля улья.

traits.locale_text: Укрепленный арматурой из пластали ферробетон способен стать прочным основанием самого колоссального шпиля улья.

languages.text: Ferrocrete fortified with plasteel beams is capable of serving as the foundation for even the colossal spires of hive worlds.
languages.original_text: Укрепленный арматурой из пластали ферробетон способен стать прочным основанием самого колоссального шпиля улья.

traits.locale_text: Rockcrete fortified with plasteel beams can hold together even the colossal spires of the city hives.
Rockcrete fortified with plasteel beams can hold together even the colossal spires of the city hives.
Ferrocrete fortified with plasteel beams is capable of serving as the foundation for even the colossal spires of hive worlds.

languages.text: Stahlbeton, der mit Gusseisenträgern verstärkt ist, kann als Fundament selbst für die kolossalen Türme von Hive-Welten dienen.
languages.original_text: Ferrocrete fortified with plasteel beams is capable of serving as the foundation for even the colossal spires of hive worlds.

traits.locale_text: Stahlbeton, der mit Gusseisenträgern verstärkt ist, kann als Fundament selbst für die kolossalen Türme von Hive-Welten dienen.

languages.text: Le ferrobéton, renforcé par des poutres en plasteel, est capable de servir de fondation aux flèches colossales des mondes-ruches.
languages.original_text: Ferrocrete fortified with plasteel beams is capable of serving as the foundation for even the colossal spires of hive worlds.

traits.locale_text: Le ferrobéton, renforcé par des poutres en plasteel, est capable de servir de fondation aux flèches colossales des mondes-ruches.

languages.text: El ferrocemento fortificado con vigas de plasteel es capaz de servir de cimiento incluso a las colosales agujas de los mundos colmena.
languages.original_text: Ferrocrete fortified with plasteel beams is capable of serving as the foundation for even the colossal spires of hive worlds.

traits.locale_text: El ferrocemento fortificado con vigas de plasteel es capaz de servir de cimiento incluso a las colosales agujas de los mundos colmena.

languages.text: Plasteel kirişlerle güçlendirilmiş betonarme, kovan dünyalarının devasa kuleleri için bile temel görevi görebilir.
